title: Toy Soldiers Fall Apart
description: Pages 11–14 focus on toy soldiers fall apart, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Luffy, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as doflamingo's officers prepare for decisive fights as the rebellion spreads and the final path to Doflamingo narrows.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I don't know where you two became butt buddies,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: But if you wanna stop this guy, just pummel him until he loses conscious- mess!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: There's no way I can do that!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: One more hit and it's off to neverland for you! Fufufu! What a fitting end!

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: I taught you once before, didn't I law!? Take a good look!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: This bastard! We've come all the way here and he still won't fight us himself!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: That's it! I'm gonna beat your ass! I'm pissed!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: You idiot! What happened to sticking to our secret plan!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Remember, don't let him get you all fired up!

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: Hey, Heey! He's gonna beat the shit out of law!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Has he lost his mind! Hilarious! Behehe!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: Hey now, you are part of that gene- ration too!

summary: Toy Soldiers Fall Apart develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Unknown person #1, Luffy, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
